mapper.sql: u.id, u.property_id, p.property_code, u.tower_id, t.tower_code, u.unit_code, u.unit_name, u.unit_type, u.occupancy_status, u.status
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unit_master u INNER JOIN tower t ON t.id = u.tower_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(u.unit_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(u.unit_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(u.occupancy_status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(t.tower_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM unit_master u INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = u.property_id INNER JOIN tower t ON t.id = u.tower_id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM unit_master u INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = u.property_id INNER JOIN tower t ON t.id = u.tower_id WHERE u.unit_code = #{unitCode} AND u.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unit_master (tenant_id, property_id, tower_id, unit_code, unit_name, unit_type, occupancy_status, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{towerId}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{unitType}, #{occupancyStatus}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE unit_master SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, tower_id = #{request.towerId}, unit_code = #{request.unitCode}, unit_name = #{request.unitName}, unit_type = #{request.unitType}, occupancy_status = #{request.occupancyStatus}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE unit_master SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
